author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(this): ensure all functions are able to be destructured (#5611)
body:
* fix(this): ensure all functions are able to be destructured

fixes #5589

Done this with a combination of the typescript-eslint unbound-method (which shows the error) and method-signature-style (which fixes the error)

* !fixup lint --fix side-effect

* less specific stuff

* fix resulting type issues

* fix(breadcrumb): consistent null, make undefined forbidden by ts
